creator: Studded@dal.net
text:
In /usr/src/usr.bin/tn3270/* there are several files named
"makefile" in directories with no Makefile. As far as I can see this is
the only place in the tree where this inconsistency exists.

Fix: 

Change the name of the files. If there is a good reason for it to
be this way, feel free to close this.
How-To-Repeat: 
	find /usr/src -name makefile
